title: BenthiCat - SSS Pre-training
content:
# BenthiCat - SSS Pre-training

Authors: Rajani, Hayat, Rajani, Hayat
Published: 2025-10-15T10:54:29Z
Subjects: Computer and Information Science, Earth and Environmental Sciences
DOI: doi:10.7910/DVN/2VCN7Y

This dataset comprises unlabeled side-scan sonar (SSS) tiles from the BenthiCat collection, curated for self-supervised representation learning and pre-training tasks. The dataset is organized into sector-specific subdirectories, each containing overlapping 384×384 pixel tiles extracted from the corresponding SSS waterfalls.

Citation: Rajani, Hayat, 2025, "BenthiCat - SSS Pre-training", https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/2VCN7Y, Harvard Dataverse, V1
